vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-24800
vulnerability.description: Demo advisory: TLS renegotiation flaw in the bundled openssl.

statements.action_statement: Upgrade the runtime image to an openssl 3.0.10 base.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-13337
vulnerability.description: Demo advisory: request-parsing flaw reachable through openssl.

statements.impact_statement: The affected parser is compiled out of the ACME build.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-30112
vulnerability.description: Demo advisory: heap overflow, fixed upstream.
